name: 5× Q-Solution (Betaine GC-Enhancer)
nameCn: 5× Q-Solution（甜菜碱 GC 增强剂）

usage.en: 5 M Betaine stock (Qiagen Q-Solution equivalent) for amplifying GC-rich templates. Equalizes AT and GC melting temperatures, prevents polymerase stalling on secondary structures.
usage.zh: 5 M 甜菜碱母液（等效 Qiagen Q-Solution），用于扩增 GC 富含模板。均衡 AT/GC 碱基对熔解温度，防止聚合酶在二级结构处停滞。

prepSteps.step: Weigh exactly 5.86 g anhydrous Betaine (do NOT use Betaine-HCl).
Add to 15 mL tube with ~5 mL nuclease-free water.
Adjust final volume to 10.0 mL with nuclease-free water.

notes.en: Use at 1× final concentration (1 M Betaine). For 50 µL PCR: add 10 µL of 5× Q-Solution and subtract from water volume. Use ONLY as troubleshooting additive for GC >60% or strong secondary structures (hairpins). Do NOT use Betaine-HCl — must be anhydrous Betaine.
notes.zh: 终浓度 1×（1 M 甜菜碱）。50 µL PCR 体系加 10 µL 5× Q-Solution（相应减少水量）。仅用于 GC 含量 >60% 或强二级结构的 troubleshooting。必须用无水甜菜碱，不可用盐酸甜菜碱。
